summary: Comprehensive testing of Phase 1-3 features for Kaimera Learning EdTech CRM. Backend: 38/38 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical flows verified working including teacher search, class filters, proofs tab, badges tab, wallet page, student profile with location fields.

backend: GET /api/search/teachers?q= - empty query returns all teachers
GET /api/wallet/summary - student gets balance and transactions
GET /api/wallet/summary - teacher gets balance, pending_earnings, bank_details
POST /api/admin/assign-student - no credit_price required (uses system pricing)
POST /api/admin/assign-badge - admin can assign badge to teacher
POST /api/teacher/feedback-to-student - teacher sends feedback, creates notification
GET /api/renewal/check - teacher can check their renewals
GET /api/renewal/check - student can check their renewals
POST /api/student/update-profile - student can update location fields
frontend: Admin Dashboard - Teachers tab with teacher search (KL-T code search)
Admin Dashboard - Teachers show teacher_code (KL-T0001) and badges
Admin Dashboard - Classes tab with filters (Type: Demo/Regular, Status)
Admin Dashboard - Classes tab search input and Filter button
Admin Dashboard - Proofs tab with date filtering (Date From, Date To)
Admin Dashboard - Badges tab with user select and badge name input
Counsellor Dashboard - Teacher search input works
Counsellor Dashboard - Student cards show institute, goal, time slot
Counsellor Dashboard - Assign dialog has NO credit_price input (uses system pricing)
Counsellor Dashboard - Assign dialog shows 'System pricing will apply' message
Student Dashboard - Wallet button present
Student Dashboard - Edit Profile dialog has Grade/Class dropdown
Student Dashboard - Edit Profile dialog has City, State, Country inputs
Student Wallet Page - Shows balance (300.00 credits)
Student Wallet Page - Shows transaction history
Student Wallet Page - Has 'Buy Credits' button
Teacher Dashboard - Shows wallet balance in header
Teacher Dashboard - Has Wallet button
Teacher Wallet Page - Shows balance (100.00 credits)
Teacher Wallet Page - Has Bank Details section with all fields
Teacher Wallet Page - Save Bank Details button works

seed_data_creation: Test badges assigned during backend testing (TEST_Badge_* prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1-3 features fully tested and working. Teacher search by name/ID (KL-T format) works in Admin and Counsellor dashboards. Class filters (demo/regular, status, search) work. Student filters (grade, city, state) work. Wallet API returns balance, transactions, and pending_earnings for teachers. Admin proof approval workflow ready (no proofs currently pending). Badge assignment works. Teacher feedback to student creates notification. Renewal check at 80% completion works. Student profile has location fields (city, state, country, grade). Teacher profile update with bank_details works. Counsellor assign student no longer requires credit_price (uses system pricing).

features_verified.teacher_search_api: WORKING - GET /api/search/teachers?q=KL-T returns teachers with teacher_code
features_verified.wallet_api: WORKING - GET /api/wallet/summary returns balance, transactions, pending_earnings
features_verified.renewal_check: WORKING - GET /api/renewal/check returns classes at 80% completion
features_verified.admin_dashboard_teacher_search: WORKING - Search input with KL-T code search
features_verified.admin_dashboard_badges_tab: WORKING - User select and badge name input
features_verified.counsellor_dashboard_teacher_search: WORKING - Find Teacher section with search
features_verified.counsellor_dashboard_no_credit_price: WORKING - Assign dialog shows 'System pricing will apply'
features_verified.student_profile_location_fields: WORKING - Grade, City, State, Country in Edit Profile
features_verified.wallet_page_teachers: WORKING - Balance, bank details form, transactions
features_verified.wallet_page_students: WORKING - Balance, Buy Credits button, transactions
